item.title: Mid-Cap Segment Sees Sharp Decline Amid Broad Market Weakness on 3 Mar 2026
item.description: The mid-cap segment, as represented by the BSE Midcap index, experienced a notable downturn on 3 March 2026, declining by 1.04% on the day and registering a 0.2% drop over the past five trading sessions. Despite this overall weakness, select stocks within the segment demonstrated resilience, underscoring a mixed performance landscape that investors should carefully analyse. Time: 6 minutes ago

item.title: Large-Cap Segment Faces Broad Sell-Off as Defensive Stocks Outperform Cyclicals
item.description: The large-cap segment, represented by the BSE 100 index, has experienced a notable downturn in recent sessions, with a decline of 1.31% on the day and a sharper 2.06% drop over the past five days. Despite this broad weakness, select heavyweight stocks and defensive sectors have shown resilience, highlighting a cautious market environment amid ongoing volatility. Time: 6 minutes ago

item.title: Small-Cap Segment Faces Downward Pressure Amid Broad Market Weakness
item.description: The BSE Smallcap index has experienced a notable decline over recent sessions, reflecting broader market challenges and sector-specific pressures. Despite pockets of strong individual stock performances, the overall small-cap segment has underperformed key benchmarks, with breadth indicators signalling a cautious investor sentiment. Time: 6 minutes ago

item.title: Large-Cap Segment Sees Sharp Decline Amid Defensive and Cyclical Divergence
item.description: The large-cap segment, represented by the BSE 100 index, has experienced a notable decline over recent sessions, reflecting a cautious investor sentiment amid mixed sectoral performances. While the index has slipped by 1.31% today and 2.06% over the past five days, the market narrative is shaped by a divergence between defensive and cyclical stocks, with select heavyweight movers influencing overall trends. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Mid-Cap Segment Faces Broad Sell-Off as BSE Midcap Index Declines 1.04%
item.description: The mid-cap segment witnessed a broad-based decline on 3 March 2026, with the BSE Midcap index falling by 1.04% amid weak breadth and sectoral disparities. Despite the overall downturn, select stocks managed to buck the trend, highlighting the nuanced performance within this market capitalisation band. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Small-Cap Segment Faces Pressure Amid Broad Market Weakness on 3 March 2026
item.description: The BSE Smallcap index has experienced a notable decline over recent sessions, reflecting broader market pressures and sector-specific challenges. Despite pockets of strong performance, the segment’s overall trend has been negative, with a significant number of stocks retreating and breadth indicators signalling caution for investors. Time: 1 hour ago

item.title: Large-Cap Segment Slumps Amid Broad Market Weakness; Defensive Stocks Show Resilience
item.description: The large-cap segment, represented by the BSE 100 index, has experienced notable weakness in recent sessions, declining by 1.31% on the day and 2.06% over the past five days. This downturn reflects a broader market hesitation, with defensive and cyclical stocks showing contrasting performances amid a challenging macroeconomic backdrop. Time: 2 hours ago

item.title: Small-Cap Segment Faces Downward Pressure Amid Broad Market Weakness
item.description: The BSE Smallcap index has experienced a notable decline in recent sessions, reflecting broader market pressures and sector-specific challenges. Despite pockets of strong individual stock performances, the overall small-cap segment has underperformed key benchmarks, signalling a cautious investor sentiment towards this riskier market segment. Time: 2 hours ago

item.title: Mid-Cap Segment Faces Broad Sell-Off as BSE Midcap Index Declines 1.04%
item.description: The BSE Midcap index experienced a modest decline of 1.04% on 3 March 2026, reflecting a cautious market sentiment amid broader sectoral pressures. Over the past five trading sessions, the mid-cap segment has slipped by 0.2%, signalling a slight pullback after recent gains. Despite the overall downturn, select stocks within the segment delivered notable performances, underscoring the mixed nature of the market environment. Time: 2 hours ago

item.title: Small-Cap Segment Faces Downward Pressure Amid Broad Market Weakness
item.description: The BSE Smallcap index has experienced a notable decline in recent sessions, reflecting broader market headwinds and sector-specific challenges. Despite pockets of strong performance, the segment's overall trend points to underperformance against larger benchmarks, with breadth indicators signalling a cautious investor sentiment. Time: 3 hours ago

item.title: Mid-Cap Segment Faces Broad Sell-Off as BSE Midcap Index Declines 1.04%
item.description: The BSE Midcap index experienced a modest decline of 1.04% on 3 March 2026, continuing a subdued trend over the past week with a 0.2% drop. Despite this, select stocks within the segment delivered notable returns, highlighting a mixed performance across sectors and stocks. Time: 3 hours ago

item.title: Large-Cap Segment Slips Amid Broad Market Weakness; Defensive Stocks Show Resilience
item.description: The large-cap segment, represented by the BSE 100 index, has experienced a notable downturn this week, with a cumulative decline of 2.06% over the past five trading sessions. Despite pockets of resilience, the majority of heavyweight stocks have succumbed to selling pressure, reflecting a cautious market mood amid mixed economic signals and sectoral rotations. Time: 3 hours ago

item.title: Large-Cap Segment Faces Broad Sell-Off Amid Defensive Sector Strength
item.description: The large-cap segment, represented by the BSE 100 index, has experienced notable weakness in recent sessions, declining 1.31% on the day and 2.06% over the past five trading days. Despite this broad downturn, select heavyweight stocks have bucked the trend, while defensive sectors have outperformed cyclical counterparts amid ongoing market volatility. Time: 4 hours ago

item.title: Mid-Cap Segment Faces Broad-Based Decline Amid Weak Market Sentiment
item.description: The BSE Midcap index experienced a modest decline of 1.04% on 3 March 2026, reflecting a cautious market mood as broader economic concerns weighed on investor sentiment. Over the past five trading sessions, the mid-cap segment has slipped by 0.2%, signalling a period of consolidation after recent gains. Despite the overall downturn, select stocks within the segment delivered notable performances, underscoring the varied dynamics at play. Time: 4 hours ago

item.title: Small-Cap Segment Faces Downward Pressure Amid Broad Market Weakness
item.description: The small-cap segment, as measured by the BSE Smallcap index, has experienced a notable decline over recent sessions, underperforming broader benchmarks amid uneven sectoral performances and weak market breadth. Despite pockets of strong individual stock returns, the overall trend reflects investor caution and selective risk aversion in this volatile market segment. Time: 4 hours ago

item.title: Thrive Future Habitats Limited is Rated Sell
item.description: Thrive Future Habitats Limited is rated 'Sell' by MarketsMOJO, with this rating last updated on 20 March 2025. However, the analysis and financial metrics discussed here reflect the stock’s current position as of 03 March 2026, providing investors with an up-to-date view of the company’s fundamentals, valuation, financial trends, and technical outlook. Time: 4 hours ago
